title: Venezuela quake toll climbs to 2,595 as damage estimates mount after strongest tremor in a century
summary_full: Death toll from twin earthquakes that struck Venezuela jumped to 2,595, as rescue operations continued after the country's strongest tremors in over a century.
summary_public: Death toll from twin earthquakes that struck Venezuela jumped to 2,595, as rescue operations continued after the country's strongest tremors in over a century.
